description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On Friday, April 3, 2026 (Reiwa 8), under clear skies, the Surugadai University entrance ceremony took place. I attended as a guest and offered congratulatory remarks.

To all of you who have been admitted: my heartfelt congratulations on your enrollment. I sincerely hope that you will enjoy a fulfilling student life—studying, participating in sports and cultural activities—within the university's spacious campus and against the backdrop of this city's abundant natural environment. I also offer my warmest wishes for the health and happiness of all those in attendance, and for the continued development of Surugadai University.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202604/13407.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Surugadai University Entrance Ceremony, Reiwa 8 (2026)
